title: Implement healthcare vertical generator behavior
description: Current: no healthcare generator exists in branding-core. Expected: generateBrandHealthcare returns deterministic healthcare strategy output with style-aware branches and safe fallback for unknown styles.
acceptance_criteria: generateBrandHealthcare returns all fields required by BrandHealthcareOutput
At least one healthcare-specific branch differs by style and unknown style falls back to minimal-safe defaults
brief summary output includes brand name and does not include undefined placeholders
out_of_scope: MCP tool registration and server wiring
completion_summary: Healthcare generator implementation exists with style-aware behavior and safe fallback output shape.
